title: Oxidation of cellulose by acid‐sodium nitrite systems
author_string: Arendt, J. H., Carrière, J. P., Bouchez, P., Sachetto, J. P.
journal: Journal of Polymer Science: Polymer Symposia
abstract: AbstractInvestigations on the oxidation of cellulose by phosphoric acid‐sodium nitrite systems have shown that the specificity of the reaction depends on the concentration of the acid. Supporting evidence has been given by chemical analysis, x‐ray diagrams, and identification of degradation products. The suggestion of a mechanism of oxidation by the nitrosonium ion instead of nitrous acid is supported by experimental results.
